title: daemon/store: update_contact_fully panics in async context
description: daemon/src/store.rs:1604-1609: panics when both blocked and display_name are None. In async Tokio, a panic inside a task brings down the task rather than propagating as a Result. The test at line 2093 proves the panic fires. Consider debug_assert!() for dev builds and returning Err in release to preserve task isolation while keeping the programmer-error semantics.
